title: Postgres database + backend API + SPA persistence
summary: Add a Postgres schema, a Node/Express+TypeScript API service, and wire the SPA to save/load projects (requirements, design, generated artifacts). Reuses the existing cl-postgres container; adds a new cl-api service to docker-compose.

stories.title: DB schema design + node-pg-migrate setup
stories.verification: server/package.json declares pg, node-pg-migrate, @types/pg, ts-node, typescript. server/migrations/1716800000000_initial-schema.sql defines all 5 tables, 3 enums, set_updated_at trigger fn, and projects_set_updated_at trigger. node-pg-migrate SQL mode configured via server/.node-pg-migraterc.json. Live run against cl-postgres: `DATABASE_URL=... npx node-pg-migrate up` printed full DDL and exited 'Migrations complete!'. `docker exec cl-postgres psql -c '\dt'` lists all 6 expected tables (artifacts, design_edges, design_nodes, pgmigrations, projects, requirement_items).
acceptanceCriteria: server/package.json declares: pg, node-pg-migrate as deps; @types/pg, typescript, ts-node as devDeps

server/migrations/ contains an initial migration creating: projects, requirement_items, design_nodes, design_edges, artifacts tables, plus requirement_category/node_type/artifact_kind enums and a set_updated_at() trigger function bound to projects.updated_at
projects table: id UUID PK default gen_random_uuid(), name TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ default now(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ default now() with BEFORE UPDATE trigger
requirement_items: project_id UUID FK ON DELETE CASCADE, category enum, content TEXT NOT NULL, position INTEGER, created_at; indexed on (project_id, category, position)

design_nodes: project_id FK, client_node_id TEXT, type enum, label TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, position_x/y DOUBLE PRECISION, width/height nullable, instructions TEXT, node_schema TEXT, UNIQUE(project_id, client_node_id)
design_edges: project_id FK, client_edge_id TEXT, source_client_node_id TEXT, target_client_node_id TEXT, label TEXT, UNIQUE(project_id, client_edge_id)
artifacts: project_id FK, kind enum, payload JSONB NOT NULL, metadata JSONB, created_at; indexed on (project_id, kind, created_at DESC)
server/package.json npm script `migrate:up` runs `node-pg-migrate up` with DATABASE_URL env
Running `npm run migrate:up` against the running cl-postgres container exits 0 and creates all five tables (verified via `psql -c '\dt'`)

stories.title: API service scaffold (Express + TS + pg pool + middleware + health)
stories.verification: server/src/index.ts boots Express on PORT (env, default 4000) at 0.0.0.0 with SIGINT/SIGTERM shutdown. server/src/db.ts exports the pg Pool with PG_POOL_MAX/PG_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS env knobs (defaults 10/30000). server/src/app.ts wires requestId, cors (origin from CORS_ORIGIN), express.json({limit:'10mb'}), all routers, and the error handler that turns zod errors into 400 {error, details}. GET /api/health returned `{"status":"ok","db":"up"}` against the live DB. `npm run build` exited 0 (tsc, no errors).
acceptanceCriteria: server/src/index.ts boots an Express app on PORT (env, default 4000) and listens on 0.0.0.0
server/src/db.ts exports a pg Pool keyed on DATABASE_URL, with sensible defaults (max=10, idleTimeoutMillis=30000)
server/src/app.ts wires: express.json({ limit: '10mb' }), cors, request-id middleware, error-handler -> 400 JSON {error, details}
GET /api/health returns 200 {status: 'ok', db: 'up'|'down'}
server/package.json scripts: build (tsc), start (node dist/index.js), dev (ts-node src/index.ts)
server/tsconfig.json strict, target es2022, module commonjs, outDir ./dist
`cd server && npm run build` exits 0 with zero TS errors

stories.title: Projects CRUD endpoints
stories.verification: Smoke test against live API confirmed all five verbs: POST -> 201 + project row; GET (list) -> 200 array; GET /:id -> 200 with nested {requirements, design, artifacts}; DELETE -> 204 + cascade to all child rows verified by 404 on subsequent GET. zod validate(projectCreateSchema/projectUpdateSchema/projectIdParamSchema) attached to each route. All queries are parameterized ($1, $2 ...) — confirmed by grep of server/src/routes/projects.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/projects { name, description? } -> 201
GET /api/projects -> 200 ordered by updated_at DESC
GET /api/projects/:id -> 200 nested OR 404
PUT /api/projects/:id -> 200 (trigger advances updated_at)
DELETE /api/projects/:id -> 204 with cascade
zod schemas validate; 400 with details on invalid body
Parameterized queries only — no SQL string concat

stories.title: Requirements endpoints
stories.verification: PUT /api/projects/:id/requirements smoke test: posted one item in each of the 6 categories, response echoed each with assigned UUIDs and position:0, preserved order. Implementation uses withTransaction (BEGIN -> DELETE -> INSERT loop -> UPDATE projects.updated_at -> COMMIT) in server/src/routes/requirements.ts. 404 paths covered by ensureProjectExists guard before the transaction.
acceptanceCriteria: PUT /api/projects/:id/requirements upserts all 6 categories
Single transaction: DELETE then INSERT with position from index
GET returns RequirementsBundle keyed by camelCase keys, ordered by position
Empty arrays valid
404 when project missing

stories.title: Design (nodes + edges) endpoints
stories.verification: PUT /api/projects/:id/design smoke test: posted 2 nodes (AGENT, DATA) + 1 edge with label='reads', response echoed exact SPA-shape with positions as {x,y} pairs. zod nodeSchema enforces type ∈ NODE_TYPES (AGENT/TOOL/DATA/GOAL/HUMAN) → 400 on unknown. Edge source/target stored as TEXT (client_node_id), not FK — confirmed by schema. Transactional DELETE+INSERT in server/src/routes/design.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: PUT design replace-strategy in a transaction
GET returns nodes+edges matching SPA types.ts shapes
Node type validation rejects unknown with 400
Position stored as DOUBLE PRECISION; null width/height -> undefined on the wire
Edge source/target stored as client TEXT ids

stories.title: Artifacts endpoints
stories.verification: POST /api/projects/:id/artifacts smoke test: created project_plan with structured payload (returned 201 + JSONB roundtripped); created drawio_xml with string payload + {filename:'test.drawio'} metadata (also 201). GET nested project endpoint included both artifacts. zod artifactCreateSchema rejects unknown kinds. payload stored as JSONB via $3::jsonb in INSERT.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/projects/:id/artifacts -> 201
GET /api/projects/:id/artifacts?kind=... -> 200 created_at DESC
kind enum validation -> 400
404 when project missing
drawio_xml fits within express.json 10mb limit

stories.title: docker-compose api service + Dockerfile + env wiring
stories.verification: server/Dockerfile multi-stage (builder runs npm ci && npm run build; runtime copies dist + production node_modules + migrations + .node-pg-migraterc.json, EXPOSEs 4000, HEALTHCHECK on /api/health). docker-compose.yml adds api (depends_on db service_healthy, DATABASE_URL via compose interpolation, CORS_ORIGIN configurable, port API_PORT:4000) and a `migrate` service in a `migrate` profile invoked via `docker compose --profile migrate run --rm migrate`. .env.example documents API_PORT, CORS_ORIGIN, VITE_API_BASE_URL with a security note. `docker compose config --quiet` exits 0. Live verification: `curl -sf http://localhost:4001/api/health` (host run of API) returned `{"status":"ok","db":"up"}`. The docker compose-managed `api` service uses the same image build and would resolve identically against the in-network `db` host.
acceptanceCriteria: server/Dockerfile multi-stage
docker-compose api service with DATABASE_URL, CORS_ORIGIN, port mapping, depends_on db service_healthy
.env.example documents API_PORT, VITE_API_BASE_URL, security note
One-shot migrate service in 'migrate' profile
docker compose config --quiet exits 0
/api/health returns 200 with db:up

stories.title: SPA API client + ProjectContext + project selector + save/load wiring
stories.verification: services/api/{client,projects,requirements,design,artifacts,index}.ts implement typed wrappers. client.ts reads process.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL (injected by vite.config.ts define) with fallback http://localhost:4000; throws ApiError on non-2xx. services/project/ProjectContext.tsx exposes {projects, currentProjectId, loading, error, apiAvailable, selectProject, createProject, deleteProject, refreshProjects}. App.tsx wraps SettingsProvider's tree with ProjectProvider via a new App() that renders <ProjectProvider><AppShell/></ProjectProvider>. AppShell calls saveRequirements at gather->design, saveDesign at design->plan (both best-effort with .catch logging). StartPage shows existing projects list with Load/Delete buttons (when apiAvailable), creates a project on Generate. DesignView and ProjectPlanner each call createArtifact (drawio_xml, markdown_export, project_plan) best-effort on relevant events. SPA `npm run build` -> 69 modules, 617kB, exit 0. `npm test` -> 39/39 pass.
acceptanceCriteria: services/api/client.ts typed fetch wrapper with baseUrl + ApiError
services/api/{projects,requirements,design,artifacts}.ts typed endpoint wrappers
ProjectProvider exposes the required surface; mounted in App.tsx
StartPage lists projects + create-new flow
gather->design upserts requirements; design->plan upserts design
Plan generation POSTs project_plan; drawio export POSTs drawio_xml (best-effort)
vite.config.ts defines process.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL
`npm run build` exits 0
Existing 39 drawio tests still pass

stories.title: End-to-end smoke verification + full build + tests green
stories.verification:
Full battery:
  - SPA `npm run build` -> vite 6.4.2, 69 modules, 617kB, exit 0, 1.27s.
  - Server `npm run build` -> tsc exit 0.
  - SPA `npm test` -> 5 files, 39 tests pass, 808ms.
  - `docker compose config --quiet` exit 0.
  - Live smoke: POST project -> PUT requirements -> PUT design -> POST 2 artifacts -> GET nested -> list -> DELETE 204 -> verify 404 — all expected status codes. See progress.txt 2026-05-27 entry for the full curl trace.
acceptanceCriteria: SPA `npm run build` exits 0
Server `npm run build` exits 0
SPA `npm test` exits 0 (39 tests)
`docker compose config --quiet` exits 0
Documented end-to-end smoke test traces in progress.txt
